title: Matt Ikuvalu
extract:
Matt Ikuvalu (born 9 November 1993) is an Australian professional rugby league footballer who plays as a winger or centre for the Wyong Roos in the Central Coast Division Rugby League.
He previously played for the Sydney Roosters and the Cronulla-Sutherland Sharks in the National Rugby League (NRL), and the Catalan Dragons in the Super League.
